text: ‘And made short work of it’; literally, ‘and he ran thence, and scattered it’. The Hebrew text is emended by some critics so as to mean ‘he carried it away’ instead of ‘he ran’.

vv. 15-18: see III Kg. 13.2. ‘That was Israelite born’; literally, ‘that came from Samaria’. The old prophet lived in Bethel, and the reference to Samaria is probably meant to imply that he belonged to Israel, not to Juda.
